name: HR operations in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month tool
description: For HR operations in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month, delayed completion of onboarding paperwork causes productivity loss. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking via email.
target_audience: HR operations in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month
features: Manual entry option for HR to update paperwork status

locked_fields.primary_user: HR operations in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR operations in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month, delayed completion of onboarding paperwork causes productivity loss. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking via email.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of paperwork status and reminders via email
must_have_features: Manual entry option for HR to update paperwork status

one_liner: For HR operations in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month, delayed completion of onboarding paperwork causes productivity loss. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking via email.
